title: Current time in locale
excerpt: Where rows/items are contact names, and there exists a location column, is there a function or formula to display contact’s local time in an adjacent column?

posts.author: jscottsmith (Scott Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Where rows/items are contact names, and there exists a location column, is there a function or formula to display contact’s local time in an adjacent column?

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jscottsmith

I’d recommend checking out The World Clock column for this!

This will allow you to set a time zone for each of your items and view it directly from your board.
You can also set working hours to see if each item is within working hours or outside of it!

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again @jscottsmith

It look like Current time in locale - #2 by Dani post here might have answered your question, is that correct?

If so, please don’t forget to mark it as the solution so other users can easily find it, and to close this thread
If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,
Danisolve

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
